Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Today FSLY dominates the rankings at position #1 with a composite score of 92.8, driven by exceptional long-term returns (413% over 1 year) and perfect passage through all four moving average gates (SMA 30/50/100/200). The stock shows remarkably consistent momentum across timeframes, with a strong 1-month return of 53.69% that substantially outpaces SPY's performance by 57.15 percentage points, though ratio consistency scores moderately at 87.9 due to some uneven sequential gains. CENX ranks second with strong fundamentals including 240.6% 1-year returns and four out of five ratio passes, but carries a notably worse resilience score (-1.0018 vs FSLY's -0.1877) when SPY experiences down days, suggesting it may be more vulnerable during market stress. Both leaders maintain pricing above their long-term moving averages and significantly outperform broad indices, but FSLY demonstrates cleaner technical progression with better preservation of gains during broader market weakness.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
